name: studio.list_redirects
description: Enumerate URL redirects configured on an Actium Studio site. Returns source path, destination, HTTP status, and hit count.
whenToUse: Pre-flight before creating a new redirect — check whether the source path is already mapped to avoid a duplicate or conflicting rule.
Audit: answer 'which URLs on this site are redirected' for a cleanup or link-integrity pass.
Migration report: after a slug change, enumerate the redirects ensuring old URLs still resolve.
whenNotToUse: Caller already knows the exact redirect_id to edit — skip listing; go to studio.update_redirect.
Caller wants a site's navigation structure — use studio.get_navigation; redirects are URL-rewrite rules, not menu entries.
Caller wants analytics on redirect hits in aggregate — use studio.get_analytics_overview; redirect hit_count here is per-rule only.
